overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic downtown district. The player character explores a trash-strewn alley, then continues along busy sidewalks beneath towering skyscrapers and elevated highways, passing various pedestrians and street vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with pawn shop and trash-filled alley

events.description: approaching trash-filled alley with green dumpsters and scattered debris
camera turns toward person lying on ground who shifts position slightly

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and investigating the trash-strewn alley area to the right

notable_agents.action: person lying on ground among trash bags and cardboard, appears injured or unconscious

entered.detail: illuminated green sign reading 'PAWNS' mounted on building facade
large screen displaying purple and pink neon graphics on building side
green industrial dumpsters surrounded by scattered trash and debris
stacked cardboard boxes and wooden pallets near the dumpsters

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath a building overhang, passing a green neon pawn shop sign. The camera approaches a trash-filled alley with green dumpsters and scattered debris, where a person lies on the ground among the garbage. The area is lit by street lamps and the glow of a large digital billboard visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with central advertising pillar

events.description: exiting the trash alley area and returning to the main sidewalk
passing the large orange billboard pillar structure on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians and approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and white jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large orange structural pillar with multiple digital advertisements mounted on it
white concrete barrier wall with red spray-painted graffiti tags
traffic signal pole with illuminated lights at the upcoming intersection

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the open sidewalk away from the trash area, passing a concrete wall with red graffiti on the right. The camera approaches and passes a large orange billboard pillar structure displaying advertisements. Various pedestrians walk in the same direction while cars drive along the street to the left.

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection with other pedestrians
camera tilts upward to look at the tall buildings and billboards while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with a crowd of pedestrians while looking up at the surrounding skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crosswalk with yellow grid markings across the asphalt
tall skyscraper with illuminated windows and multiple digital billboards on its facade
elevated highway or monorail track spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a large intersection as the camera crosses the street with a dense crowd of pedestrians. Looking up reveals towering glass skyscrapers covered in bright digital billboards. A black car passes by on the left as the camera approaches an elevated highway overpass structure spanning the road ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway with vendors

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the elevated highway overpass
passing food vendor stalls with illuminated yellow umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking beneath the overpass past various street vendors and storefronts

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing beneath a yellow illuminated umbrella at a street cart

entered.detail: large billboard displaying 'EL GUAPO' text with a skull graphic
street food carts with yellow umbrellas and neon lighting
commercial storefronts with bright neon signs and illuminated displays

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive concrete overpass structure that blocks most of the sky, creating a sheltered urban canyon. The area features street-level shops with neon signage and food vendors with yellow umbrellas. The 'EL GUAPO' billboard is visible on the left while various pedestrians continue along the covered sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty, secluded alleyway into the overwhelming scale of a neon-drenched futuristic metropolis. It begins beneath a building overhang, passing a green neon pawn shop sign and moving through a trash-filled alley where a person lies among debris under the glow of a digital billboard. As the camera leaves the alley, the environment opens onto a busy sidewalk featuring red graffiti and a massive orange advertisement pillar, with pedestrians and traffic flowing alongside. The scene then expands into a wide intersection crowded with people, where the view shifts upward to reveal towering glass skyscrapers and bright billboards before the camera crosses the street. Finally, the perspective moves beneath a massive concrete highway overpass, transitioning into a sheltered urban canyon filled with neon shop signs, food vendors with yellow umbrellas, and the prominent El Guapo billboard.
